sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109633" key="u(poyiquri/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑποψῐθῠρ-ίζω</orth>, <sense id="n109633.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">whisper softly,</tr_> of fingers on the lyre, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0532.tlg001.perseus-grc1:1:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ach.Tat.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
